imageComparison.title: For us, your satisfaction is paramount.
imageComparison.description: We strive to combine high-quality craftsmanship with sustainable solutions to preserve the ecosystem AND your wallet!

informative.title: Why renovate instead of buying new?
informative.text1: Renovating windows instead of buying new ones is usually better for both the environment and your wallet.
informative.text2: Old wooden windows are made of high-quality timber and can last for many years after a professional renovation.
informative.text3: Or recommended energy glass is designed to reflect long-wave head radiation which keeps up to 50% more warmth inside.

weCover.title: We got you covered!
weCover.service1Description: Professional painting with environmentally friendly paint.
weCover.service2Description: Qualified services such as scraping, sanding, and puttying.
weCover.service3Description: We replace all types of glass, including energy glass that reduces energy costs.
weCover.service4Description: Replacing parts or entire window frames in case of damage.

leftSection.title: Save money with ROT deductions
leftSection.description: Repairs and maintenance count as ROT work, and you can get back up to 50% of the labor cost, with a maximum amount of SEK 50,000 per person per year.

rightSection.title: Free window cleaning
rightSection.description: After we have renovated your windows, we offer a free window cleaning service so that you can fully enjoy your windows.

descriptions: Prietos Company began as a vision - to create something superior through years of experience, reinforced with discipline and hard work.
What started as a one-man business became a team of skilled professionals who all share the same commitment to high-quality.
We believe that your wallet and our shared environment must be treated the same way - sustainably
You tell us what you need, and we'll take care of everything else - We guarantee the best quality!
titles: From a vision to a company
From one person to a competent team
